codeReview.summary: The stopping_conditions.rs module correctly implements all three required stopping conditions: (1) All tasks accepted check via check_all_tasks_accepted(), (2) Stop command handling via command_stop() and check_stop_command(), and (3) Hard limit breach detection via check_hard_limits() and check_task_time_limit(). The implementation is well-structured with proper enum variants, comprehensive tests (27 passing), and correct integration with HardLimits. No issues found.

sharedStateObservations.observation: No worker session handoffs or transcripts found in mission directory. The features.json shows workerSessionIds is an empty array, suggesting the feature work was done directly in the main branch without a dedicated worker session. This is consistent with the commit 3b02680 adding merge_queue.rs which is separate from stopping_conditions.rs - the stopping_conditions implementation appears to predate this mission.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission dir lacks handoffs/ and worker-transcripts.jsonl. features.json shows workerSessionIds: []

summary: The orch-stopping-conditions feature implementation passes review. The stopping_conditions.rs module correctly implements all three required stopping conditions: all tasks accepted check, stop command handling, and hard limit breach detection. 27 unit tests pass. The implementation is clean and well-documented with proper error types, Display implementations, and integration with the HardLimits module.
